parameters.query:
SELECT 
  ss.activity_id,
  ss.streams,
  ss.ftp,
  ss.max_heartrate,
  ss.created_at,
  sa.athlete_id,
  sa.moving_time,
  sa.distance,
  sa.total_elevation_gain,
  sa.start_date,
  sa.average_watts,
  sa.weighted_average_watts,
  a.firstname,
  a.lastname,
  COALESCE(ss.ftp, 200) as athlete_ftp,
  COALESCE(ss.max_heartrate, 185) as athlete_max_hr
FROM strava_streams ss
JOIN strava_activities sa ON ss.activity_id = sa.id
JOIN athletes a ON sa.athlete_id = a.id
WHERE sa.athlete_id = {{ $json.athlete_id || $json.body.athlete_id }}
  AND ss.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '42 days'
ORDER BY ss.created_at DESC
